criteria.criterion: DBB-001: Single string embedding request — POST /v1/embeddings returns { object:'list', data:[{object:'embedding', embedding:[...], index:0}], model, usage }
DBB-002: Batch string embedding — input array returns correct indices (0,1,2) with non-empty embeddings
DBB-003: Missing input field returns 400 with error mentioning 'input'
DBB-004: Empty string input does not return 500
DBB-005: Empty array input does not return 500
DBB-006: Nonexistent model returns 4xx/5xx error, not crash
DBB-007: OpenAI SDK compatibility — embeddings response matches OpenAI Embedding schema
DBB-008: Basic WAV transcription returns { text }
DBB-009: Transcription accepts model and language params
DBB-010: verbose_json format returns task, language, duration, text, segments
DBB-011: Missing file returns 400 mentioning 'file'
DBB-012: Invalid audio format returns 4xx, not 500
DBB-013: OpenAI SDK compatibility — transcriptions response matches schema
DBB-014: Basic speech request returns audio binary
DBB-015: Voice parameter is accepted
DBB-016: wav format returns audio/wav content type
DBB-017: opus format returns audio/opus content type
DBB-018: Missing input returns 400
DBB-019: Synthesize failure returns 500 with OpenAI error format
DBB-020: GET /v1/models returns base agentic-service model
DBB-021: Models response is { object:'list', data:[...] }
DBB-022: Models list includes embedding models from registry
DBB-023: Models list includes STT and TTS models from registry
DBB-024: Every model has id, object='model', created (number), owned_by (string)
DBB-025: All new endpoints return JSON error format { error: { message, type } }
DBB-026: POST-only endpoints reject GET requests (return non-200)
DBB-027: Existing chat completions — no regression (streaming + non-streaming)
DBB-028: All tests pass (198 files, 1193 passed, 0 failures)
